query: I ordered an iPhone 16 Pro Max worth Rs 1.4 lakh paid by COD but you sent me a charger instead. I want my money back immediately. This is fraud.
My order KST-DEL-004 was delivered 2 days ago but the box had a cheap charger not the Samsung phone I ordered. I paid COD. How do I get refund?
I bought a Levi's jeans 25 days back. Never wore it, tags still on. Can I still return?
Kurta delivered 17 days ago. I want to return it. What is the process?
JBL speaker delivered 12 days ago. I just opened it and it's not what I expected. Can I return?
My TV order KST-HYD-006 was supposed to be delivered by May 22. Today is May 23 and tracking shows it's still in transit. This is unacceptable.
Order promised in 3 days but 10 days gone. I want to cancel and get compensation.
Air fryer just shipped, I want to cancel before delivery. Is that possible?
Mattress order placed yesterday. Not shipped yet. Need to cancel.
MacBook screen flickering since last week. It's been 40 days since delivery. What are my options?
Samsung phone battery draining in 2 hours after full charge. Bought 17 days ago. This is a premium device, I expect better.
TV bought 3 months ago has display issues now. Is it covered under warranty?
Boat earbuds left side not working at all. Just received 2 days ago. Dead on arrival.
Nike shoes sole came off after wearing only 3 times in 5 days. Manufacturing defect.
Study table has a wobbling leg. Delivered 12 days ago. Looks like manufacturing defect.
I returned an order 15 days ago. Refund status still shows pending. Where is my money?
Cancelled my kurta order before shipping. When will I get the refund?
Foundation I bought is the wrong shade. I want to exchange or return.
Toor dal packet full of insects and weevils. This is disgusting. I want full refund.
Chocolates delivered completely melted and deformed. Expensive ones from Amul pack.
Cricket bat arrived broken in half. Box was intact so it was packed broken.
I have been calling support for 5 days about a refund that never came. Everyone says they will check and never call back. Who can I escalate to?
Mujhe apna order cancel karna hai. Kal kiya tha order. Please help. Hinglish mein baat kar raha hoon.
Phone ki delivery open box hui thi. Seal toota hua tha. Maine refuse kar diya. Paisa kab milega?
Order delivered to wrong address. Tracking shows delivered but I never received anything. Neighbor's house maybe.
